senses.gloss: to scratch, to wound by cutting with the nail or the reaping-hook or in another fashion; to sting, to bite
to snatch, to seize, to clutch, to rend
to allure, to charm, to fascinate, to coax, to captivate with blandishment, to deceive, to hoax
case, hull, shell, something which provides less than it suggests, sheet lightning, cloud bearing no rain
ligneous fibers from which the trunk of a palm is made; the medulla of a palm
